name: Novaworks.ai
description: AI-native Human Capital Management (HCM) operating system built on ServiceNow. Designed for Total Workforce Management (TWM). Agents unify people, AI agents, and processes across enterprise HR operations. Agent-first architecture for employee lifecycle, payroll, benefits, and workforce planning.
capabilities: AI agents for employee lifecycle management
notes: Launched March 2026. AI-native HCM OS built on ServiceNow. $8M seed funding. Agent-first design means HR workflows run autonomously by default with human oversight available. Designed for enterprise scale. Target market: 1000+ employee organizations modernizing HR infrastructure.
